title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
